title: Bridge Retrofit Program
description: Retrofit works for aging bridge components, including deck strengthening and railing upgrades.

title: Warehouse Expansion Phase 1
description: Design-build expansion with structural steel, slab extension, and stormwater improvements.

title: Municipal Road Improvement
description: Road widening, concrete paving, drainage channels, and traffic safety markings.

title: Site Drainage Upgrade
description: Installation of drain lines, catch basins, and pavement tie-ins to improve stormwater flow.

title: Plant Utility Piping Renewal
description: Replacement of old utility pipe racks, supports, and valves in active production zones.

title: Commercial Fit-Out Package
description: Interior fit-out for office and retail units with MEP coordination and compliance checks.

title: Concrete Pavement Rehabilitation
description: Concrete panel replacement, joint resealing, and surface correction for heavy traffic lanes.

title: Flood Control Channel Works
description: Channel lining, embankment stabilization, and culvert tie-ins for seasonal flood reduction.

title: Substation Civil Works
description: Foundation, cable trenching, and equipment pads for substation upgrade.

title: Factory Ventilation Upgrade
description: Duct routing, fan support structures, and airflow balancing works in production halls.

title: School Building Retrofit
description: Structural strengthening and accessibility upgrades for academic facilities.

title: Homeowner Condo Fit-Out
description: Premium residential interior renovation with kitchen rework, finish approvals, and portal-backed homeowner updates through closeout.
